title: Smooth Wool
description: This pack changes the texture of wool in Minecraft to a smoother one
body:
> This resource pack changes the default wool textures in Minecraft to a smoother and cleaner version while keeping the original vanilla style. The goal is to make wool blocks look less noisy and more pleasant to the eyes, which is perfect for builders and players who like simple and polished textures. It works great for colorful builds and modern structures without changing the classic Minecraft feeling.

- By Dokzera
